items.title: Midjourney Medical
items.author: ricochet11
items.summary_zh: Midjourney Medical 是一个专为医疗影像分析而优化的 AI 工具，基于 Midjourney 的图像生成能力，帮助医生快速识别病灶、生成高质量医学插图，甚至辅助手术规划。它解决了传统医疗影像判读耗时且依赖经验的问题，尤其对放射科医生和外科团队来说，能大幅提升诊断效率和教学演示效果。目前还在早期阶段，但已展现改变医疗 AI 交互方式的潜力。
items.summary_en: Midjourney Medical adapts the famous image generation model specifically for healthcare. It helps radiologists and surgeons analyze medical scans, generate annotated visuals, and plan procedures with greater speed and accuracy. By turning complex imaging data into clear, AI-assisted interpretations, it reduces diagnostic time and supports medical education. For professionals who need faster, more intuitive imaging tools, this could be a game-changer in clinical workflows and telemedicine.

items.title: Lore – Open source version control system designed for scalability
items.author: regnerba
items.summary_zh: Lore是一个新推出的开源版本控制系统，其核心设计目标是应对超大规模代码仓库和持续集成场景下的性能瓶颈。与传统Git每次提交存储完整快照不同，Lore采用基于内容寻址的存储模型和增量压缩算法，能大幅降低存储占用和网络传输量。它特别适合那些拥有成千上万开发者、每天频繁提交的大型项目。虽然Lore仍处于早期阶段，但它针对现代工程团队痛点的设计思路，已经引起了不少基础设施工程师的关注。
items.summary_en: Lore is a new open-source version control system built specifically for scalability. Unlike Git, which stores full snapshots on every commit, Lore uses content-addressed storage and incremental compression to dramatically reduce disk usage and network overhead, making it ideal for massive monorepos and high-frequency CI environments. The project targets large engineering teams with thousands of daily commits who have outgrown Git's performance. Although still early-stage, Lore has already caught the attention of infrastructure engineers frustrated by Git's limitations in large-scale settings. Its design philosophy focuses on speed, reliability, and handling ultra-large repositories without degradation.

items.title: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.author: theorchid
items.summary_zh: 一名安全研究人员在 GitHub 上发现超过一万个仓库正在分发特洛伊木马恶意软件，这些仓库通过伪装成合法项目来诱骗开发者下载。这一发现凸显了开源生态的安全隐患，提醒开发者在使用第三方库时必须保持警惕，防止供应链攻击。
items.summary_en: A security researcher uncovered over 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware, often disguised as legitimate projects to trick developers into downloading them. This finding highlights a significant supply chain risk in the open source ecosystem, urging developers to exercise caution with third-party libraries and implement thorough code review practices.

items.title: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
items.author: ck2
items.summary_zh: 现代汽车正式宣布收购波士顿动力，这家以机器狗Spot和类人机器人Atlas闻名的公司从此归入汽车巨头麾下。这笔交易意味着波士顿动力将从研发探索走向商业落地，现代计划将机器人技术融入汽车制造和未来出行场景。对于工业自动化领域，这起收购标志着人形机器人和四足机器人开始真正进入工厂流水线，可能极大提升生产效率并改变传统汽车制造业的作业方式。
items.summary_en: Hyundai has officially acquired Boston Dynamics, the company famous for its robotic dog Spot and humanoid Atlas. This deal shifts Boston Dynamics from pure R&D toward commercial deployment, as Hyundai plans to integrate robotics into automotive manufacturing and future mobility. The acquisition marks a major milestone for industrial automation, bringing legged robots into factory floors. It could dramatically boost production efficiency and transform traditional car assembly lines, benefiting manufacturers looking for flexible automation solutions that can handle complex physical tasks.

items.title: GLM-5.2 is the new leading open weights model on Artificial Analysis
items.author: himata4113
items.summary_zh: GLM-5.2 在 Artificial Analysis 的评估中成为领先的开源权重模型，它在多项基准测试中超越了同类模型。这一进展表明开源大语言模型正在快速追赶闭源方案，为开发者提供了更强力的免费替代品，推动 AI 社区的民主化进程。
items.summary_en: GLM-5.2 has emerged as the top-performing open weights model on Artificial Analysis, surpassing many competitors across multiple benchmarks. This achievement signals that open source large language models are rapidly catching up with proprietary solutions, offering developers a powerful free alternative and further democratizing access to advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
items.author: ilreb
items.summary_zh: 挪威政府宣布在小学阶段近乎全面禁止使用人工智能工具，理由是对隐私、儿童认知发展以及教育公平的担忧。这项政策禁止学校部署任何基于AI的教学辅助系统，但允许在特殊教育场景下例外。挪威成为全球对AI教育应用最严厉的国家之一，这一做法可能引发其他欧洲国家的效仿。对于教育科技公司来说，这无疑是一个重大打击，但也促使业界更审慎地思考AI在低龄儿童中的使用边界。
items.summary_en: Norway has announced a near-total ban on artificial intelligence tools in elementary schools, citing concerns over privacy, children's cognitive development, and educational equity. The policy prohibits schools from deploying any AI-based teaching aids, with narrow exceptions for special education. This makes Norway one of the strictest nations regarding AI in education, potentially setting a precedent for other European countries. For edtech companies, the ban is a major setback, but it also pushes the industry to more carefully consider the appropriate boundaries of AI use for young children.

items.title: Identity verification on Claude
items.author: bathory
items.summary_zh: Anthropic最近在其AI助手Claude上引入了身份验证功能，用户需要提供手机号或邮箱来完成验证。这个看似简单的改动，实际上是为了应对日益严重的AI滥用问题，比如虚假账号批量生成、对话被用于恶意训练等。对于普通用户来说，多了一步验证可能会影响使用体验，但长远看，它有助于维护AI服务的安全性和可信度，防止Claude被不法分子利用。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has rolled out identity verification for its AI assistant Claude, requiring users to provide a phone number or email to complete the process. While this extra step might seem like a minor inconvenience, it addresses the growing problem of AI abuse — fake accounts, bulk generation of harmful content, and malicious fine-tuning. For regular users, it means a slightly less seamless sign-up, but in the long run, this measure is crucial for maintaining the safety and integrity of the AI service, preventing Claude from being weaponized by bad actors. It reflects a broader trend of AI companies taking responsibility for how their models are used.

items.title: GPT-5.5 hallucinates 3x more than MIT-licensed GLM-5.2
items.author: oshrimpton
items.summary_zh: 一项新测试显示，OpenAI 的 GPT-5.5 在事实性幻觉方面的比率是 MIT 开源模型 GLM-5.2 的三倍。GLM-5.2 由智谱AI开发并采用宽松的 MIT 许可证发布，在多项基准测试中表现出更低的虚构内容倾向。这一发现引发了对闭源大模型可靠性以及开源替代方案优势的讨论。对于依赖 AI 生成准确信息的开发者来说，GLM-5.2 可能是一个更值得信赖的选择。
items.summary_en: In a surprising benchmark, OpenAI's GPT-5.5 hallucinates three times as often as the MIT-licensed GLM-5.2 model developed by Zhipu AI. GLM-5.2, released under a permissive open-source license, shows significantly lower rates of factual fabrication in the tests. This result challenges the assumption that larger proprietary models are inherently more reliable. For developers and businesses seeking trustworthy AI outputs, GLM-5.2 emerges as a compelling alternative, raising questions about the trade-offs between closed-source performance and open-source accountability.

items.title: Did my old job only exist because of fraud?
items.author: advisedwang
items.summary_zh: 一篇来自Hacker News的热门文章引发了广泛讨论，作者回顾了自己曾经的一份工作，并提出了一个尖锐的问题：这份工作是否仅仅因为公司存在欺诈行为而存在？他通过亲身经历揭露了一些行业普遍存在的虚高估值、虚假业绩和泡沫式扩张现象。这不仅让人反思某些岗位的真实价值，也提醒求职者和投资者警惕那些建立在虚假繁荣基础上的商业模式，以及随之而来的职业风险。
items.summary_en: A popular Hacker News post sparked wide discussion as the author looked back at a former job and asked a sharp question: did that job exist only because of fraud? Through personal experience, he exposed common practices in some industries like inflated valuations, fabricated performance, and bubble-driven expansion. This not only makes people reflect on the real value of certain roles but also warns job seekers and investors about business models built on fake prosperity and the associated career risks.

items.title: Deno Desktop
items.author: GeneralMaximus
items.summary_zh: Deno Desktop是一个新工具，允许开发者使用Deno运行时直接构建跨平台的桌面应用程序。它结合了Web技术和Deno的现代特性，如TypeScript原生支持、安全权限模型和内置工具链，使得桌面应用开发变得更加简单高效。对于那些希望用JavaScript或TypeScript快速开发桌面应用而又不想依赖Electron的开发者来说，这是一个轻量级的替代方案，同时保持了Deno的安全性和性能优势。
items.summary_en: Deno Desktop is a new tool that lets developers build cross-platform desktop applications directly using the Deno runtime. It combines web technologies with Deno's modern features such as native TypeScript support, a security permission model, and a built-in toolchain, making desktop app development simpler and more efficient. For developers who want to quickly create desktop apps with JavaScript or TypeScript without relying on Electron, this is a lightweight alternative that maintains Deno's security and performance advantages.

items.title: penpot/penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration
items.author: penpot
items.summary_zh: Penpot 是一款开源的设计与代码协作工具，旨在打破设计师和开发者之间的壁垒。它原生支持 SVG，提供矢量图形、原型设计和代码导出功能，让团队无需依赖昂贵的商业软件即可实现无缝对接。对于追求开源、跨平台协作的设计团队和开发团队来说，Penpot 是一个理想选择。
items.summary_en: Penpot is an open source design tool focused on bridging the gap between designers and developers. It supports native SVG, vector graphics, prototyping, and code export, enabling seamless collaboration without expensive commercial licenses. Perfect for teams that value open source and cross-platform workflow, Penpot lets designers and developers work together on the same canvas.

items.title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
items.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
items.author: ZhuLinsen
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于大语言模型的多市场股票智能分析系统，能自动采集多源行情数据、实时新闻，并通过决策看板呈现分析结果，还支持消息推送。它最大的亮点是接入LLM来理解市场动态，让普通投资者也能获得类似专业机构的分析能力。系统设计为可以零成本定时运行，特别适合希望用AI辅助投资决策的个人交易者。
items.summary_en: This is an LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system that automatically collects market data, real-time news, and provides a decision dashboard with push notifications. Its standout feature is using large language models to interpret market dynamics, giving individual investors access to analysis that once required professional teams. Designed to run on a schedule at zero cost, it's particularly useful for retail traders who want an AI-assisted edge in their investment decisions.

items.title: koala73/worldmonitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
items.author: koala73
items.summary_zh: koala73/worldmonitor 是一个开源实时全球情报仪表盘，它通过人工智能技术聚合新闻、监控地缘政治动态并追踪基础设施状况，为决策者提供统一态势感知。这款工具特别适合需要快速掌握全球局势的记者、分析师或应急管理人员，帮助他们在海量信息中理清脉络。
items.summary_en: koala73/worldmonitor is an open source real-time global intelligence dashboard that leverages AI to aggregate news, monitor geopolitical shifts, and track infrastructure status in a single situational awareness interface. It‘s designed for journalists, analysts, and emergency responders who need to quickly grasp complex global events and make informed decisions from scattered data.

items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
items.author: bytedance
items.summary_zh: 字节跳动开源了DeerFlow，一个面向长期任务的超级智能体框架。它能够自主进行研究、编码和创作，借助沙箱环境、记忆模块、工具调用、技能学习和子代理协作来应对复杂场景。对于需要构建可扩展AI工作流的开发者来说，这提供了一个灵活且强大的基础工具。
items.summary_en: ByteDance open-sourced DeerFlow, a long-horizon SuperAgent framework that autonomously researches, codes, and creates. It leverages sandboxes, memory, tools, skills, and sub-agents to handle complex multi-step tasks, making it a powerful tool for developers building scalable AI workflows.

items.title: byoungd/English-level-up-tips
items.description: An advanced guide to learn English which might benefit you a lot 🎉 . 人生进阶指南 离谱的人生 离谱的英语学习指南/英语学习教程/英语学习/学英语
items.author: byoungd
items.summary_zh: 这个名为“English-level-up-tips”的开源项目是一份颠覆传统的英语进阶指南，被形容为“离谱的英语学习指南”。它不堆砌单词表，而是从认知与方法论入手，帮助学习者突破瓶颈，被许多用户誉为人生进阶的实用手册。
items.summary_en: This open-source project, English-level-up-tips, offers an unconventional advanced guide to learning English. Instead of vocabulary lists, it focuses on cognitive approaches and methodologies to help learners break through plateaus. Many users praise it as a life-upgrade manual for serious language learners.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库公开了从Anthropic和OpenAI等AI公司模型中提取的系统提示（system prompts），包括Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking等版本。这些提示揭示了模型背后的一些行为规则和设计逻辑，对AI研究者和开发者理解模型内部机制、进行提示工程非常有价值，但也引发了关于安全和隐私的讨论。
items.summary_en: This repository contains extracted system prompts from major AI models including Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, and OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. These leaked prompts provide rare insight into how these models are instructed to behave, revealing design logic and safety rules. For AI researchers and prompt engineers, this is a goldmine for understanding and improving prompt techniques. However, it also raises concerns about intellectual property and security, as companies typically keep such system prompts confidential.

items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: 这个项目是著名 TypeScript 教育家 Matt Pocock 分享的一份“技能清单”，直接来自他的 AI 编程助手 Claude 的配置文件。它列出了他认为一名“真正工程师”应该掌握的核心能力——从代码审查、架构决策到技术债管理，覆盖了远比语法更重要的工程实践。与其说是代码库，不如说是一份工程文化的宣言。适合想提升团队工程水平或建立个人技术成长路线的开发者阅读。
items.summary_en: This is Matt Pocock's personal skill list for 'real engineers,' extracted straight from his Claude AI configuration. It goes far beyond coding syntax to cover code review, architecture decisions, tech debt management, and communication—the soft and hard skills that separate experienced engineers from beginners. It's less a codebase and more a manifesto on engineering culture. If you're looking to level up your professional practice or define what 'good engineering' means for your team, this concise list is a great starting point.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: Understand-Anything 能将任何代码库自动转化为可交互的知识图谱，让你可以像搜索和提问一样探索代码结构。它打破了传统线性阅读代码的模式，通过可视化展示函数、类、模块之间的关系，帮助开发者快速理解大型项目。对于接手历史代码、参与开源贡献或学习新框架的人来说，这个工具极大降低了认知负担，让理解复杂代码变成一场有趣的导航体验。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Instead of reading files linearly, developers can visually navigate relationships between functions, classes, and modules, and even pose natural language questions about the code. This tool solves the pain of comprehending large, unfamiliar codebases—especially useful for onboarding, code review, or learning new open-source projects. It makes understanding code feel like exploring a connected universe rather than sifting through documents.

items.title: apple/container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.author: apple
items.summary_zh: 苹果官方开源了一个名为container的工具，它利用轻量级虚拟机在Mac上创建和管理Linux容器。整个工具用Swift编写并针对Apple Silicon深度优化，为macOS开发者提供了一种原生、高效且安全的容器运行方案，填补了Apple生态中本地Linux容器体验的空白。
items.summary_en: Apple has open-sourced container, a tool that creates and manages Linux containers on Mac using lightweight virtual machines. Written in Swift and optimized for Apple Silicon, it delivers a native, fast, and secure container experience on macOS. This project fills a long-standing gap for developers who need Linux containers without leaving the Apple ecosystem.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph 是一个预先索引的代码知识图谱工具，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供结构化的上下文信息。开发者再也不用手动整理项目结构，AI 助手能瞬间理解代码库全貌，大幅提升代码生成和调试的准确性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人，这就像给 AI 装上了一张实时的项目地图。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that automatically syncs with your code changes, feeding structured context to popular AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor. Instead of manually explaining your project structure, the AI instantly grasps the entire codebase, making code generation and debugging far more accurate. It's like giving your AI a live, up-to-date map of your project. Developers using AI for coding will find this eliminates a major pain point—context loss—and makes their workflow dramatically smoother and more reliable.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: MarkItDown 是微软开源的一个 Python 工具，能把各种常见文档（Word、Excel、PPT、PDF、HTML 等）批量转换成 Markdown 格式。对于需要将非结构化文档喂给大语言模型或者做文本分析的开发者来说，这简直是神器——因为大多数 AI 工具处理结构化文本（如 Markdown）都比原始二进制文件要好。它简洁、依赖少、输出质量高，尤其适合做 RAG（检索增强生成）的文档预处理环节。
items.summary_en: MarkItDown is a practical Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx, etc.), PDFs, HTML, and more into clean Markdown. Why does this matter? Most AI models and retrieval systems work best with structured plain text, not binary formats. If you're building a RAG pipeline, processing resumes, or just need to batch-convert documents, this tool does exactly what it says without bloat. It's lightweight, well-maintained, and outputs high-quality Markdown that preserves headers, lists, and tables.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.

items.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
items.author: mvanhorn
items.summary_zh: mvanhorn/last30days-skill 是一个 AI 代理技能，能自动从 Reddit、X、YouTube、Hacker News、Polymarket 和全网搜索某个话题，并合成一份有据可循的摘要。它解决了信息碎片化问题，帮助研究者、内容和投资者快速了解最近30天内的舆论热点和市场情绪。
items.summary_en: mvanhorn/last30days-skill is an AI agent capability that automatically researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the broader web, then synthesizes a grounded summary. It tackles information fragmentation, making it invaluable for researchers, content creators, and investors who need a quick, reliable overview of recent discourse and sentiment around a topic.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: 这个项目收集了全球各地公开可用的IPTV频道，让你能轻松观看来自世界各国的电视节目。对于热爱探索不同文化节目或身处海外想收看家乡频道的人来说，它提供了一个免费且便捷的聚合入口，无需繁琐的订阅流程。重要的是，它完全开源并由社区维护，频道列表会持续更新，有效解决了寻找稳定免费IPTV源的常见痛点。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.
items.author: Panniantong
items.summary_zh: Agent-Reach是一个命令行工具，让AI代理能够直接“看到”整个互联网。它支持读取和搜索Twitter、Reddit、YouTube、GitHub、Bilibili、小红书等主流平台，而且不需要任何API费用。对于开发AI代理的人来说，最大的痛点就是如何让代理获取实时、跨平台的信息，这款工具通过简单的CLI命令就解决了这个问题。无论是做社交媒体分析、技术趋势追踪还是内容聚合，开发者都可以零成本地为自己的AI装上“眼睛”。
items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.title: Agent 37 Cloud
items.description: Give every customer their own Hermes or OpenClaw agent
items.summary_zh: Agent 37 Cloud 为每位客户分配专属的 Hermes 或 OpenClaw 智能代理，实现个性化服务自动化。无论是自动处理查询、调度任务还是集成第三方工具，它都能像一位不知疲倦的私人助理般高效运转。对于需要大规模定制化客户体验的企业来说，这款产品将代理能力从通用工具升级为贴身管家，真正解决了一对一服务难以规模化的问题。
items.summary_en: Agent 37 Cloud gives each customer their own dedicated Hermes or OpenClaw agent, turning personalized service automation into reality. It handles queries, schedules tasks, and integrates third-party tools tirelessly, like a personal assistant that never sleeps. For businesses needing massive customization in customer experience, this product elevates generic automation to a bespoke concierge service, solving the age-old challenge of scaling one-on-one interactions.

items.title: Atomic Mail Agentic
items.description: Let your agents read, send, and react to email autonomously
items.summary_zh: Atomic Mail Agentic 让你的智能代理能够自主读取、发送邮件并做出反应，将电子邮件管理完全自动化。它就像一个永不疲倦的秘书，替你筛选收件箱、回复常规询问、甚至触发后续操作。对于每天处理大量邮件的商务人士、销售团队和客户支持部门而言，这款产品释放了人力，让邮件从负担变成高效协作的齿轮。
items.summary_en: Atomic Mail Agentic empowers your agents to autonomously read, send, and react to emails, fully automating email management. It acts as an tireless secretary, filtering your inbox, replying to routine queries, and triggering follow-up actions. For busy professionals, sales teams, and customer support departments drowning in emails, this product frees up human effort, transforming email from a burden into a cog in efficient collaboration.

items.title: Grok by SpaceXAI for Word
items.description: Draft, restructure & tighten wording from panel inside Word

items.title: Backgrind
items.description: Run your AI agents over any app, even games.

items.title: oioi
items.description: a fast, glassy clipboard manager for macOS, Windows & Linux

items.title: WorkClaw
items.description: Collaborative, proactive AI coworkers who work in Slack
items.summary_zh: WorkClaw是一款在Slack中运行的协作型主动AI同事工具，它不像普通聊天机器人那样被动回答问题，而是能主动承担任务追踪、信息同步和提醒等协调工作。团队只需用自然语言描述需求，WorkClaw就能自动创建待办事项、安排会议并跟进项目进度。对于远程团队和跨部门协作来说，它相当于一个不知疲倦的虚拟项目经理，能显著减少沟通成本并提升团队执行效率。
items.summary_en: WorkClaw is a proactive AI coworker that lives inside Slack, unlike passive chatbots that only answer queries. It actively handles task tracking, information sync, and reminders. Teams can simply describe their needs in natural language, and WorkClaw automatically creates to-dos, schedules meetings, and follows up on project milestones. For remote teams and cross-functional collaborations, this is like having a tireless virtual project manager that cuts down communication overhead and boosts execution efficiency. It's particularly useful for busy knowledge workers who struggle to keep up with coordination tasks.

items.title: Reframe
items.description: Surf like it's 1999
items.summary_zh: Reframe是一款复古风格的浏览器扩展，它将网页浏览体验带回1999年的互联网时代，包括经典的界面设计、像素风格字体和怀旧元素。它并非简单的主题皮肤，而是重新模拟了早期网页的浏览方式，让用户沉浸式体验互联网初期的魅力。对于怀旧用户或想了解互联网历史的年轻人来说，Reframe提供了一种独特的数字复古体验。
items.summary_en: Reframe is a browser extension that recreates the classic web browsing experience of 1999, complete with retro interface designs, pixelated fonts, and nostalgic visual elements. It goes beyond mere theming by simulating the actual feel of early internet navigation, offering users a time-travel-like journey to the dawn of the web. This tool appeals to nostalgic users who long for the simplicity of early online days and to younger generations curious about digital history, providing a fun, immersive way to appreciate how far the web has come.

items.title: Slackbot’s MCP Client
items.description: Work across 20+ apps in Slack with multiplayer collaboration
items.summary_zh: Slackbot 的 MCP 客户端让你可以在 Slack 中直接操作 20 多款应用，并支持多人实时协作。无需切换窗口，团队成员就能共享数据、同步操作，像在同一个虚拟工作台上协作。它特别适合远程或混合团队，将日常沟通与工具使用融为一体，显著减少上下文切换带来的效率损失。
items.summary_en: Slackbot’s MCP Client brings multiplayer collaboration to Slack by allowing users to interact with over 20 apps directly from the chat interface. Teams can share data and perform actions together without leaving the conversation, effectively turning Slack into a unified workspace. This reduces context switching and speeds up workflows, making it ideal for remote and hybrid teams who want tighter tool integration.

items.title: Mellum by JetBrains
items.description: Fast LLMs for low-latency and high-performance workflows

items.title: pumaDB
items.description: a small hosted memory layer for AI agents

items.title: Claude Code Artifacts
items.description: Preview and share your coding work live as it happens
items.summary_zh: Claude Code Artifacts 是一个让开发者能够实时预览并分享代码成果的新功能。当你在与 Claude 对话编写代码时，它会直接生成可运行的界面或片段，并支持即时共享，方便团队成员直接查看效果。对于需要快速原型设计和协作的团队来说，这大大降低了沟通和验证的成本。
items.summary_en: Claude Code Artifacts transforms how developers interact with AI by enabling live previews and sharing of code as it's being written. Instead of describing outputs verbally, Claude now produces runnable code artifacts that team members can instantly see and interact with. This makes pair programming with AI more tangible and speeds up feedback loops, especially valuable for remote teams collaborating on prototypes or debugging complex systems.

items.title: Zernio WhatsApp API
items.description: One API for WhatsApp: messaging, calling, and AI agents
items.summary_zh: Zernio WhatsApp API 提供了一套统一的接口，让开发者只需一次集成就能处理 WhatsApp 的消息收发、语音通话以及 AI 代理功能。过去需要对接多个服务才能实现的复杂工作流，现在可以在一个平台上完成。对需要快速搭建 WhatsApp 客服机器人或自动化营销系统的企业来说，这大大简化了开发流程并降低了维护成本。
items.summary_en: Zernio WhatsApp API consolidates messaging, calling, and AI agents into a single integration point, eliminating the need to stitch together multiple services. By providing a unified interface for WhatsApp's communication channels alongside AI agent capabilities, it streamlines the development of customer support bots, automated sales systems, and interactive voice applications. Businesses can now deploy sophisticated WhatsApp-based solutions faster and with less complexity.

items.title: Midjourney Scanner
items.description: 60 second ultrasound-based full-body scanner that beats MRI
items.summary_zh: Midjourney Scanner是一款基于超声波的全身扫描设备，只需60秒即可完成扫描，甚至声称在某些场景下优于MRI。它利用先进的超声波成像技术和AI重建算法，能快速生成三维人体影像，且无辐射、成本远低于核磁共振。对于基层诊所、体检中心和急诊分诊来说，这台设备有望大幅降低高端影像检查的门槛。不过，其实际诊断准确率仍需更多临床数据验证，但它已经展示了让医学影像变得更便捷、更普惠的潜力。
items.summary_en: Midjourney Scanner is a full-body ultrasound device that completes a scan in just 60 seconds and claims to outperform MRI in certain scenarios. It combines advanced ultrasound imaging with AI reconstruction algorithms to produce 3D body images quickly, with no radiation and at a fraction of the cost of magnetic resonance imaging. For primary care clinics, health check centers, and emergency triage, this device could dramatically lower the barrier to high-end medical imaging. While its diagnostic accuracy needs further clinical validation, it already shows enormous potential to make medical imaging faster, cheaper, and more accessible.

items.title: Firecrawl Research Index
items.description: An index for agents pushing the frontier of AI/ML research
items.summary_zh: Firecrawl Research Index 是一个面向 AI 研究智能体的索引，它追踪并整理机器学习领域的前沿成果，帮助研究人员和开发者快速定位最新突破。通过聚合论文、模型与实验数据，这个工具让智能体能够自主发现和引用高质量研究，从而加速科研探索进程，尤其适合需要持续跟进 AI 最新动态的团队。
items.summary_en: Firecrawl Research Index is a curated index designed for AI agents to explore the cutting edge of machine learning research. It aggregates papers, models, and experiments, enabling agents to autonomously discover and cite high-quality findings. This tool solves the problem of information overload in fast-moving fields, making it especially valuable for research teams and developers who need to stay current with breakthroughs without manual sifting.

items.title: API to MCP
items.description: Turn any API into an MCP server for AI agents
items.summary_zh: API to MCP 是一个将任意 REST API 快速转化为 MCP（Model Context Protocol）服务器的工具。借助它，AI 智能体可以直接调用原本仅供人类使用的 API 接口，无需复杂适配。这大幅降低了将外部服务接入 AI 代理的难度，开发者和企业可以用它快速构建能联网操作的智能助手，拓展自动化边界。
items.summary_en: API to MCP lets you convert any REST API into an MCP server, enabling AI agents to call those endpoints directly. This removes the need for custom connectors and complex integrations, as agents speak the standard MCP protocol. Developers can quickly give their AI assistants access to real-world services like databases, project management tools, or e-commerce platforms, opening up a wide range of automation possibilities.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 全面封禁 Cursor！又一家大厂出手了
items.description: 最近，有网友爆料称：快手的研发线发布通知，收紧了对第三方编程软件的使用权限。 不少同学发现，只要在自己办公电脑上点开 Cursor，就直接闪退，压根儿用不了。
items.summary_zh: 有网友爆料快手研发线发布通知，收紧第三方编程软件权限，员工电脑上打开Cursor就会闪退。这标志着又一家大型互联网公司正式封禁AI编程工具Cursor，反映出企业对代码安全和数据隐私的担忧。对于依赖Cursor提升效率的开发者来说，这一趋势可能迫使他们在工具选型和企业合规之间做出权衡。
items.summary_en: A tipster revealed that Kuaishou’s R&D department issued a notice tightening permissions on third-party programming software, causing Cursor to crash immediately when opened on work computers. This marks another major tech company officially banning the AI coding tool, reflecting growing concerns about code security and data privacy. For developers who rely on Cursor for efficiency, this trend may force a trade-off between tool preference and corporate compliance.

items.title: 又是梁文锋，有点猛啊。
items.description: 又是梁文锋 前几天一年一度的高考不是刚落下帷幕嘛。 说巧不巧，正好这两天我在小绿书上好几次刷到有关一位国内 AI 圈顶级大佬当年的高考故事。 没错，这位大佬正是 DeepSeeek 的创始人：梁文锋。
items.summary_zh: 高考刚结束，网上又翻出了DeepSeek创始人梁文锋当年的高考故事。这位AI圈的顶级大佬，当年以优异成绩考入名校，如今带领DeepSeek在人工智能领域掀起波澜。他的经历不仅激励着无数考生，也让人看到技术人才如何从校园走向行业巅峰。梁文锋的故事再次证明，真正的创新往往源自深厚的学术积累和持续的坚持。
items.summary_en: Just as the annual college entrance exam wrapped up, stories about Liang Wenfeng, the founder of DeepSeek, resurfaced online. Back in the day, he achieved top scores on the gaokao and entered a prestigious university. Now, as a leading figure in the AI world, he is making waves with DeepSeek. His journey inspires students and professionals alike, showcasing how solid academic foundations and relentless persistence can drive groundbreaking innovation in the tech industry.

items.title: 艹，维护AI写的代码，我心态崩了......
items.description: 最近做了一个项目，同事用AI写的页面，出来之后效果感人。但是因为使用的插件的版权问题，应用的部分插件需要重新选择。 由于同事还有其他问题需要处理，我接手了这个功能，改的时候发现，根本无法下手
items.summary_zh: 作者接手同事用 AI 生成的页面代码后，发现由于插件版权问题需要全部重构，但代码结构混乱、缺乏注释、逻辑耦合严重，导致无从下手。文章通过真实案例暴露出当下 AI 生成代码在可维护性上的短板，提醒团队在使用 AI 辅助开发时仍需人工审查与重构，否则后期维护成本可能远超预期。
items.summary_en: The author took over a page generated by AI from a colleague, only to find the code was a mess—tightly coupled, uncommented, and tangled. A plugin license issue forced a full rewrite, but the code was so hard to understand that the author felt frustrated. This story highlights a real problem with AI‑generated code: while it may work initially, poor structure and lack of maintainability can lead to higher long‑term costs, urging teams to always review and refactor AI outputs.

items.title: 最近公司烧token比招员工还贵，老板干懵了...
items.description: 如题。 这真的没在开玩笑。 这也是最近不少公司，在大力、甚至全面拥抱 AI 之后所发出的切实吐槽。 一个月前，Uber 的 CTO 曾对外透露，公司自部署 CC 以来，内部有超 9 成的工程师在高频率
items.summary_zh: 这不是段子，是真实发生在许多公司里的窘境。随着全面拥抱AI，员工高频调用大模型API，公司的token消耗费用竟然超过了招聘新员工的成本。Uber的CTO曾透露，内部有超过九成的工程师在频繁使用AI服务。老板们面对账单直呼头疼：本来是降本增效的AI，怎么成了新的烧钱黑洞？
items.summary_en: This isn't a joke—it's a real dilemma many companies are facing. After wholeheartedly adopting AI, their token usage costs have actually surpassed the expense of hiring new employees. Uber's CTO revealed that over 90% of their engineers are using AI services heavily. Bosses are staring at the bills in shock: the technology that was supposed to reduce costs and boost efficiency has instead become a new money-burning black hole.

items.title: 为什么有的人偏爱 Mac
items.description: 为什么有的人偏爱 Mac 我之前大概用了十几年的 Windows，最近入职了一家新公司，公司强制给我发了 M4 版顶配的 Mac，一开始非常不习惯，到现在也有 3 个多月了。这里和大家分享下日常工作中
items.summary_zh: 作者在使用了十几年 Windows 后，因新公司强制分配顶配 Mac 而被迫切换。三个多月的适应过程让他体会到 macOS 在生态统一、触控板手势和续航方面的独特优势。文章以真实体验对比两者差异，解释了为何许多开发者最终偏爱 Mac，尤其适合那些追求稳定与高效工作流的用户。
items.summary_en: After a decade on Windows, the author was forced to switch to a top‑spec Mac by their new employer. The three‑month adaptation revealed macOS’s strengths in ecosystem integration, trackpad gestures, and battery life. By comparing everyday workflows, the article explains why many developers eventually prefer Mac—it offers a consistent, distraction‑free environment that boosts productivity, especially for long coding sessions.

items.title: 程序员副业 | 2026年4月复盘
items.description: 我看后台有人催更，确实很久没写复盘了，年后一直在折腾，今天有时间，来复盘下4月份做的事情吧，最近真的是疯狂在通宵编程哈哈，今天我开发的软件发布了新版本，稍微可以清闲一下。
items.summary_zh: 这是一位程序员分享的2026年4月副业复盘，作者回应读者催更，讲述了自己年后持续折腾、通宵编程开发软件并发布新版本的经历。文章展现了副业程序员面临的巨大时间投入与自我驱动力，同时也描述了新版本上线后的短暂轻松。对于同样在探索副业的开发者来说，这篇复盘既是一种共鸣，也是激励——持续投入终会带来可见的成果。
items.summary_en: A programmer shares their side project recap for April 2026, responding to readers who urged an update. The author describes an intense period of coding overnight after the new year, finally releasing a new version of their software. This post highlights the significant time commitment and self-discipline required for side projects, along with the fleeting relief of shipping a release. For developers juggling side hustles, this recap resonates deeply—it shows that sustained effort eventually pays off with tangible progress and a momentary break.

items.title: 苦撑13年，创始人离职出走，拉勾终究还是倒下了…
items.description: 拉勾破产了。 这个消息相信不少同学前几天都刷到了，当时我刚看到这个消息时，也是一声叹息。 为什么我会如此唏嘘呢？ 原因很简单。 我清晰地记得我本科毕业前后那会，拉勾开始火起来的，作为拉勾早期的用户，我
items.summary_zh: 拉勾网宣布破产，这家曾经火遍招聘行业的平台最终没能撑过第十三个年头。创始人早已离职，团队几经挣扎仍无力回天。回想起大学刚毕业时，拉勾曾是许多年轻人找工作的第一站，如今它的倒下不禁让人唏嘘。这背后既是市场竞争的残酷，也折射出招聘行业在移动互联网时代的剧烈洗牌。
items.summary_en: Lagou, a once-popular recruitment platform in China, has finally filed for bankruptcy after struggling for 13 years. Its founder left the company long ago, and despite multiple attempts to turn things around, the platform couldn't survive the brutal competition and shifting landscape of the recruitment industry. For many young graduates, Lagou was the go-to place to find their first job, making its collapse a poignant reminder of how quickly the internet market can leave once-thriving companies behind.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 5 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门：从skills到Pixelle-Video，月榜社区火力集中在「把Agent做进工程化工作流」-能省Token、能记住上下文、能编排多Agent、能产出内容。
items.summary_zh: 2026年5月GitHub十大热门项目排行榜出炉，社区火力集中在“把Agent做进工程化工作流”这一主题上。这些项目不仅能够节省Token开销、记住对话上下文，还能编排多个Agent协作并产出高质量内容。对于开发者和技术团队来说，它们意味着更高效的AI工程化落地方案，让大模型从玩具变成真正的生产力工具。
items.summary_en: The top 10 GitHub projects for May 2026 have been released, with the community's energy concentrated on embedding agents into engineering workflows. These projects save token usage, retain conversation context, orchestrate multi-agent collaboration, and produce high-quality content. For developers and engineering teams, they represent a more efficient pathway for integrating AI into production, transforming large language models from novelties into genuine productivity tools.

items.title: 刘强东称未来根本不需要快递员，要保住 70 万兄弟的工作，让他们给机器人做维修保养，如何评价这番话？
items.summary_zh: 刘强东近日表示，未来京东物流可能根本不需要快递员，但他承诺要保住70万兄弟的工作，让他们转型做机器人的维修保养。这番话引发热议，一方面承认了自动化替代人力的必然性，另一方面努力为员工寻找新出路。关键在于，这种转型是否真的可行，以及能否为大量低技能劳动力提供体面收入。它折射出企业对技术浪潮下就业问题的责任与焦虑。
items.summary_en: Liu Qiangdong, founder of JD.com, recently stated that delivery workers might become obsolete in the future, but he vowed to keep 700,000 employees by retraining them for robot maintenance. This remark sparked debate about the inevitability of automation replacing labor and whether such a transition is realistic. It highlights the tension between technological progress and job security, raising questions about corporate responsibility in reskilling low‑skill workers. The discussion matters because it touches on how major logistics companies plan to handle the coming wave of automation while maintaining social stability.

items.title: 数学博士生 2 年研究被 AI 抢发，这种现象会越来越普遍吗？如何看待 AI 对数学研究的冲击？
items.summary_zh: 一位数学博士生耗时两年的研究成果被AI抢先发表，引发了对AI在数学研究中角色的深刻讨论。AI能够快速生成证明和猜想，甚至发现人类尚未想到的模式，这让传统的研究节奏面临挑战。随着AI工具日益强大，类似事件可能更加频繁，迫使数学界重新审视研究价值、署名规则和学术伦理。对于博士生来说，这不仅是效率问题，更是职业生涯的生存危机。
items.summary_en: A mathematics PhD student saw two years of research scooped by an AI system, raising urgent questions about the impact of AI on academic mathematics. AI can now generate proofs and conjectures at astonishing speed, sometimes uncovering patterns humans missed. This trend is likely to accelerate, forcing the mathematical community to rethink research cycles, attribution, and ethics. For junior researchers, the race against AI becomes a matter of career survival. The incident serves as a wake‑up call for how institutions should adapt to a future where AI is a competitor rather than just a tool.

items.title: 普通程序员写七百行代码大概需要多久？
items.summary_zh: 这个问题看似简单，实则反映了对程序员工作效率的普遍好奇。写七百行代码的时间因人而异，取决于语言、框架、复杂度以及是否包含调试。经验丰富的开发者可能几小时完成，新手可能需要好几天。但更重要的是，代码行数本身并不是衡量价值的好标准——好的代码往往更简洁。这个提问背后，隐藏的是外界对程序员工作速度与质量的误解。
items.summary_en: How long does it take an average programmer to write 700 lines of code? The answer varies wildly depending on language, complexity, and whether debugging is included. An experienced developer might finish in a few hours, while a novice could take days. More importantly, the question reveals a common misunderstanding: code volume is a poor metric for productivity or quality. Good code is often concise. This discussion matters because it highlights how the tech industry struggles to measure and communicate real engineering output, and it reminds us that solving problems effectively matters more than typing speed.

items.title: 索尼、任天堂、微软这些主机厂商，当年都做过哪些现在看很离谱的商战操作？
items.summary_zh: 回顾主机大战历史，三大厂商都有过令人瞠目的操作：任天堂当年强制要求游戏卡带由自己生产并预付全部费用，压垮了第三方开发商；索尼在PS1时代通过极具侵略性的低价策略击败世嘉，甚至一度隐瞒真实成本；微软初代Xbox为了抢占市场，每卖一台亏上百美元。这些看似疯狂的决策在当时各有战略考量，有的成功扭转局势，有的则留下深刻教训，至今仍是商学院的反面教材。
items.summary_en: Looking back at console wars, Sony, Nintendo, and Microsoft all made seemingly insane business moves. Nintendo forced third‑party developers to pre‑pay for entire cartridge production runs, nearly bankrupting many. Sony priced the original PlayStation aggressively below cost to dominate Sega, hiding the true expense. Microsoft sold the first Xbox at a huge loss per unit just to gain a foothold. These decisions, while crazy in hindsight, were strategic gambles that either paid off spectacularly or taught hard lessons. They illustrate how high‑stakes competition can drive companies to take extreme risks, shaping the gaming industry we know today.

items.title: 卖掉公司，50位员工实现财富自由
items.summary_zh: 一家创业公司在被收购时，50名员工共同实现了财富自由。这个故事不仅展现了创业团队的圆满退出，更凸显了早期员工通过股权激励获得的丰厚回报，成为科技圈津津乐道的造富神话。
items.summary_en: When a startup was acquired, 50 employees achieved financial freedom through their equity stakes. The story highlights a successful exit for the team and underscores how early-stage stock incentives can create life-changing wealth, inspiring entrepreneurs and employees alike.

items.title: 8点1氪丨马斯克拿下7800亿元天价薪酬；伊朗代表团暂停伊美谈判，抗议特朗普威胁言论；刘强东称将来不需要快递员，要保住70万兄弟的工作
items.summary_zh: 今日热点：马斯克赢得特斯拉董事会批准的7800亿元天价薪酬方案；伊朗代表团因特朗普威胁言论宣布暂停与美国谈判；刘强东在内部讲话中提到未来可能不需要快递员，但承诺会保住70万兄弟的工作，引发行业热议。
items.summary_en: Today's top stories: Elon Musk secured a $780 billion compensation package approved by Tesla's board; Iran suspended nuclear talks with the US over Trump's threats; and Richard Liu said JD.com may not need delivery drivers in the future but vowed to protect 700,000 jobs, sparking debate about automation and employment.

items.title: OpenAI「最开放」一次，Codex不再独宠GPT
items.summary_zh: OpenAI发布了迄今为止最开放的一次Codex模型更新，不再仅专注于GPT系列。新版本支持更多编程语言和场景，允许开发者更自由地集成代码生成能力。这意味着AI编程工具正在走向更广泛的生态兼容性。
items.summary_en: OpenAI released its most open Codex update yet, moving beyond exclusive GPT integration. The new model supports additional programming languages and use cases, allowing developers to integrate code generation more freely. This signals a shift toward broader ecosystem compatibility in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 微软也烧不起 Token ，该 DeepSeek 上位了
items.summary_zh: 微软在AI大模型上烧了巨额资金却仍扛不住Token成本，这让业界开始重新审视DeepSeek的价值。DeepSeek以极低的推理价格和接近GPT-4的性能，成为中小开发者和企业替代闭源模型的首选。它的崛起不仅打破了算力巨头的垄断，也意味着AI应用可以更低成本落地，让更多创业者用得起顶尖智能。
items.summary_en: Microsoft is burning through cash on token costs for its AI models, making DeepSeek an attractive alternative. DeepSeek offers comparable performance to GPT-4 at a fraction of the price, empowering small developers and enterprises to deploy advanced AI without breaking the bank. This shift could democratize access to top-tier language models, lowering the barrier for innovation across the industry.

items.title: 洗个澡功夫，Codex 替我跟售后把退款要了回来
Claude下一代神级模型秘密出炉，Sonnet-5被曝下周上线
老登最爱的维密，又复活了
items.summary_zh: 维密这个曾经风靡全球的内衣品牌，在经历销量下滑和形象危机后，最近又悄悄复活了。它不再依赖性感超模，而是转向包容性和多元化，签约不同体型和背景的代言人，试图重新赢得消费者的心。这次复活不仅是品牌自救，更反映出整个时尚行业价值观的转变——从取悦男性审美到真正尊重女性自我表达。
items.summary_en: Victoria's Secret, once the iconic lingerie brand beloved by many, has quietly staged a comeback after years of declining sales and a damaged brand image. Instead of relying on supermodels and a narrow beauty standard, the brand is now embracing body positivity and diversity, featuring ambassadors of all shapes, sizes, and backgrounds. This revival is more than a business turnaround; it signals a fundamental shift in the fashion industry's values, moving away from catering to male gaze toward genuinely empowering women's self-expression.

items.title: 卖马桶的 TOTO 杀疯了，成了 AI 芯片的幕后赢家
items.summary_zh: 你可能想不到，那个以马桶和卫浴闻名的日本公司TOTO，竟然成了AI芯片热潮中的隐形赢家。原来TOTO在精密陶瓷领域积累了几十年技术，而这些陶瓷材料正是制造芯片光刻机关键部件所必需的。随着全球AI芯片需求暴增，光刻机产能吃紧，TOTO的陶瓷零部件供不应求，意外搭上了半导体快车，股价和利润都大幅上涨。
items.summary_en: Believe it or not, TOTO, the Japanese company famous for toilets and bathroom fixtures, has quietly become a hidden winner in the AI chip boom. The secret lies in TOTO's decades of expertise in precision ceramics — the same materials now essential for manufacturing critical components in lithography machines used to make advanced chips. As the global demand for AI chips skyrockets, those lithography machines are running at full capacity, and TOTO's ceramic parts are in high demand. The company's stock price and profits have soared, proving that sometimes the biggest players in a gold rush are the ones selling shovels.

items.title: 千亿芯片龙头，掉队了
items.summary_zh: 曾经市值超千亿的中国芯片龙头企业，如今正面临掉队的困境。随着全球半导体竞争加剧，技术迭代加速，这家公司在先进制程上的研发投入不足，产品竞争力下滑，市场份额被竞争对手蚕食。更重要的是，它未能及时抓住AI芯片这一波浪潮，导致业绩增长乏力。这个故事提醒我们，在技术密集的芯片行业，没有永远的王者，只有持续创新的生存者。
items.summary_en: A once-dominant Chinese chip company with a market value exceeding 100 billion yuan is now falling behind. As global semiconductor competition intensifies and technology advances rapidly, the company has failed to invest enough in cutting-edge process nodes, causing its products to lose competitiveness. Its market share is being eroded by rivals, and more critically, it missed the AI chip boom entirely. The result is stagnant growth and a humbling fall from grace. This serves as a stark reminder that in the fiercely innovative chip industry, past glory guarantees nothing — only relentless R&D and adaptation can keep you alive.

items.title: 为什么“洋气”反而让lululemon翻车
items.summary_zh: lululemon在中国市场栽了个跟头，原因恰恰是它太执着于维持“洋气”的国际形象。品牌坚持用欧美式的营销话术和产品设计，忽略了本土消费者的真实需求，比如尺码偏大、面料不适合亚洲气候、定价过高缺乏性价比。更重要的是，它没有理解中国年轻人对运动休闲的新定义——既要时尚感也要实用接地气。这次翻车提醒跨国品牌：全球化不是照搬，而是要真正本地化。
items.summary_en: Lululemon stumbled in the Chinese market precisely because it tried too hard to stay 'foreign' and trendy. The brand stuck with Western-style marketing and product designs, ignoring local needs: sizes were off, fabrics didn't suit Asian climates, and prices felt too high for the value. More importantly, it misread Chinese young consumers, who want athleisure that is both stylish and practical — not just a status symbol. This misstep is a classic lesson for global brands: going global doesn't mean copying your home playbook; it means genuine localization.

items.title: Codex兼容国产开源模型，实测DeepSeek接入：门槛还是太高
Claude Code之父删了IDE，干掉提示词，只写循环
淘宝闪购上线新业务"家宴"，联合米其林高星餐厅｜独家
大扁平化时代：消失的中层
茉莉奶白纽约闭店始末：品牌与加盟商的“双输”之战
当 5 亿人放弃 ChatGPT
失控，AI的第一个泡沫，是程序员
肌肉男团走红，男性的身材审美是门新生意
斯坦福报告：中国自主培养，顶尖AI人才崛起
美国新提案：「国有化」AI巨头，「全民持股」50%
Discord以自动化重构数据库运维，以管理超大规模的ScyllaDB
让开关自我消亡：AI 赋能的 Feature Flag 全生命周期治理
优步通过实时信号与Listwise排序改进餐厅推荐
items.summary_zh: 优步在其外卖平台Uber Eats上采用了全新的餐厅推荐策略，融合实时信号（如当前餐馆出餐速度、用户等待时间）与Listwise排序模型。与传统的Pointwise或Pairwise排序不同，Listwise排序直接优化整个推荐列表的排序质量，能更好地平衡用户偏好、配送效率与商家负担。这一做法显著提升了订单转化率和用户满意度，尤其在高频用餐时段效果明显。对于外卖和本地生活平台，这是一套利用实时数据与先进排序算法的实践范本。
items.summary_en: Uber has implemented a new restaurant recommendation strategy on Uber Eats that combines real-time signals—such as current cooking speed and user wait time—with a Listwise ranking model. Unlike traditional Pointwise or Pairwise approaches, Listwise ranking directly optimizes the quality of the entire recommendation list, better balancing user preferences, delivery efficiency, and merchant load. This approach has significantly boosted order conversion rates and user satisfaction, especially during peak meal times. For food delivery and local service platforms, this is a practical example of leveraging real-time data and advanced ranking algorithms.

items.title: 传统数据架构，还够用吗？
内核级的真相：为什么eBPF正在取代基于用户空间的Agent成为安全可观测性的首选
items.summary_zh: eBPF是一项革命性的Linux内核技术，它允许在不修改内核源码或加载内核模块的情况下，安全地注入并执行自定义代码。相比传统用户空间Agent，eBPF直接在操作系统内核层捕获系统调用、网络包和进程行为，具有极低的性能开销和更高的安全性。它无需目标应用做任何改造，就能实现深度可观测性，这让它在云原生环境中的安全监控与故障排查领域迅速成为首选方案。对于运维和安全团队来说，拥抱eBPF意味着更实时、更全面的观测能力。
items.summary_en: eBPF is a revolutionary Linux kernel technology that allows safe injection and execution of custom code without modifying kernel source or loading kernel modules. Unlike traditional user-space agents, eBPF captures system calls, network packets, and process behavior directly at the operating system kernel level, offering extremely low performance overhead and higher security. It provides deep observability without requiring any changes to target applications, making it the go-to solution for security monitoring and troubleshooting in cloud-native environments. For operations and security teams, adopting eBPF means gaining more real-time and comprehensive visibility.

items.title: 复旦大学教授邱锡鹏确认出席AICon上海站，分享MOSS 多模态模型的创新与实践
items.summary_zh: 复旦大学邱锡鹏教授将作为演讲嘉宾出席AICon上海站，分享其团队在MOSS大模型多模态拓展方面的最新成果。MOSS是国内最早开源的类ChatGPT中文大模型之一，如今正进一步融合图像、视频等多模态信息。邱教授会介绍MOSS在多模态对齐、指令跟随和高效微调方面的创新方法，以及这些技术如何让模型在视觉问答、图文生成等场景中表现更优。对于AI研究者和开发者来说，这是一次了解前沿多模态大模型实践与开源生态的难得机会。
items.summary_en: Professor Qiu Xipeng from Fudan University will speak at AICon Shanghai, sharing his team's latest innovations in extending the MOSS large language model to multimodal capabilities. MOSS is among the earliest open-source ChatGPT-like Chinese LLMs, and now it is incorporating images, videos, and other modalities. Professor Qiu will discuss novel methods in multimodal alignment, instruction following, and efficient fine-tuning, and how these techniques improve model performance in visual question answering and image-text generation. For AI researchers and developers, this is a rare opportunity to learn about cutting-edge multimodal LLM practices and the open-source ecosystem.

items.title: 从“机审+人审”到“AI-Native”：大模型与 Agent 驱动内容风控智能化升级｜AICon上海
items.summary_zh: 在AICon上海站，一项关键分享指出内容风控正从传统的机器加人工审核模式迈向“AI-Native”时代。借助大模型和智能Agent，系统能够自主理解内容语境、识别违规变体，并动态调整审核规则。相比传统方法，AI-Native风控不仅将识别准确率提升到新高度，还能实时响应新型攻击，彻底摆脱对人工规则维护的依赖。对于社交媒体、电商平台等内容密集型企业，这套方案意味着更低的运营成本和更强的风险抵御能力。
items.summary_en: At AICon Shanghai, a key session highlighted the shift of content moderation from traditional machine-plus-human review to an AI-native paradigm. By leveraging large language models and intelligent agents, the system autonomously understands context, detects policy violations in novel variants, and dynamically adjusts moderation rules. Compared to conventional approaches, AI-native moderation not only pushes detection accuracy to new levels but also responds to emerging attacks in real time, eliminating reliance on manual rule maintenance. For content-heavy platforms like social media and e-commerce, this translates into lower operational costs and stronger risk defense.

items.title: AI 大模型驱动银行信贷业务的全链路变革｜AICon上海
items.summary_zh: 在AICon上海站，一项重要分享揭示了AI大模型如何颠覆银行信贷业务的全链条流程。从贷前客户画像与智能营销，到贷中自动审批与动态风险定价，再到贷后监控与智能催收，大模型将传统规则引擎替换为深度学习驱动的高维决策模型。这不仅大幅降低了人工审核成本，还能在海量非结构化数据中发现隐藏风险关联，使信贷决策更加精准、高效。对于银行和金融科技公司而言，这是一次从“人治”到“AI治”的根本性升级，有望重塑整个信贷服务生态。
items.summary_en: At AICon Shanghai, a presentation revealed how large language models are revolutionizing the entire credit business chain in banking. From pre-loan customer profiling and intelligent marketing to automated approval and dynamic risk pricing during the loan, and further to post-loan monitoring and smart collections, these models replace traditional rule engines with deep-learning-driven, high-dimensional decision systems. This transformation drastically reduces manual review costs while uncovering hidden risk correlations in massive unstructured data, making credit decisions more accurate and efficient. For banks and fintech firms, this marks a fundamental shift from human governance to AI governance, potentially reshaping the entire credit service ecosystem.

items.title: 平安人寿AI 神盾平台在金融生态中的智能风控实践｜AICon上海
items.summary_zh: 在AICon上海大会上，平安人寿分享了其AI神盾平台在智能风控领域的实战经验。该平台整合了机器学习、知识图谱等技术，为金融业务提供从欺诈识别到信用评估的全链路智能防控。其价值不仅在于提升准确率和响应速度，更在于将风控从“事后补救”转变为“事前预判”——这项实践正在平安的保险、信贷等场景中显著降低坏账和理赔欺诈率，成为金融科技落地的标杆案例。
items.summary_en: At AICon Shanghai, Ping An Life detailed its AI Shield platform's real-world applications in intelligent risk control. By combining machine learning with knowledge graphs, the platform delivers end-to-end fraud detection and credit assessment for finance. The key breakthrough is shifting risk management from reactive to predictive, which has already reduced bad debts and claim fraud in Ping An's insurance and lending operations. This case stands as a benchmark for fintech AI deployment.

items.title: Spring Boot 4.1 新增 gRPC 自动配置、SSRF 防护功能并支持 Kotlin 2.3
items.summary_zh: Spring Boot 4.1正式发布，带来三项关键更新：新增gRPC自动配置简化微服务通信，内置SSRF防护增强安全性，以及对Kotlin 2.3的原生支持。这些改进直击后端开发者的日常痛点，尤其适合构建云原生应用和微服务架构的团队。升级后的框架在无缝集成、安全加固和语言生态兼容性上更进一步，让Java开发者能更专注于业务逻辑而非基础设施。
items.summary_en: Spring Boot 4.1 has landed with three major enhancements: automatic gRPC configuration to simplify microservice communication, built-in SSRF protection for stronger security, and full support for Kotlin 2.3. These updates directly address common developer pain points, making the framework even more suitable for cloud-native and microservice architectures. The release reduces boilerplate and fortifies applications, letting Java teams focus on business logic rather than infrastructure concerns.

items.title: 创业一年，把机器人送进头部车企“打工”｜对话光象科技CEO张涛
items.summary_zh: 光象科技创业一年，就把自主研发的工业机器人送进了多家头部车企的工厂。CEO张涛在对话中坦言，他们避开了与人形机器人赛道的正面竞争，专注在汽车制造中高重复性、高精度的细分场景。通过快速迭代和深度定制，机器人已经能与产线工人协同作业。这对初创公司如何在大厂夹缝中生存提供了真实参考。
items.summary_en: In just one year of founding, Guangxiang Technology has deployed its industrial robots inside several top automotive factories. CEO Zhang Tao shared in an interview that they avoided competing in the crowded humanoid robot space, instead focusing on highly repetitive, precision-demanding tasks in car manufacturing. Through rapid iteration and deep customization, their robots now work alongside human workers on the assembly line. It's a real-world case study for startups trying to survive between giants.

items.title: 当 Token 成为商品，AI 基础设施会怎么变化？
items.summary_zh: 随着AI服务普及，Token正从计算单位变成可交易的商品，这直接冲击了AI基础设施的设计逻辑。过去靠算力规模堆叠的模式，现在必须加入Token定价、分配和计费体系，就像云计算从VM走向Serverless一样。基础设施提供商需要重新思考资源调度和成本模型，而企业用户则能更灵活地控制AI开支。
items.summary_en: As AI services become mainstream, tokens are evolving from mere compute units into tradeable commodities, reshaping how AI infrastructure is built. Instead of simply scaling up raw computing power, providers must now incorporate token pricing, allocation, and billing into their platforms—similar to how cloud computing shifted from VMs to serverless models. This change forces infrastructure vendors to rethink resource scheduling and cost management, while giving enterprise users more granular control over their AI spending. It's a fundamental rethink that could make AI more accessible and cost-efficient.

items.title: Gemini 联合负责人出走 OpenAI：Google 为什么总让 AI 天才感到挫败？
items.summary_zh: Google Gemini 联合负责人出走 OpenAI，这一事件再次引发外界对 Google 如何对待 AI 人才的质疑。文章深入探讨了 Google 内部机制为何让顶尖研究者感到挫败，包括官僚主义、创新节奏缓慢和资源分配问题。这不仅是个人离职事件，更反映出科技巨头在 AI 竞赛中面临的人才保留挑战。
items.summary_en: The head of Gemini's joint leadership has left Google to join OpenAI, reigniting debates about how Google treats its AI talent. This piece analyzes the internal frustrations top researchers face at Google, such as bureaucracy, slow innovation pace, and resource allocation issues. It's not just a personnel change but a reflection of challenges tech giants encounter in retaining top minds during the AI race.

items.title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5 三天遭临时下架
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Fable 5 仅三天就遭遇临时下架，引发行业震动。该模型据称在创意写作和叙事能力上有重大突破，但可能因安全或性能问题被紧急撤回。这一事件凸显了 AI 大模型在部署前的测试与风险管控依然面临严峻挑战，也让人对 Anthropic 的安全承诺产生疑问。
items.summary_en: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, only to have it temporarily taken down after three days, shocking the AI community. The model was touted for breakthroughs in creative writing and narrative ability, but likely pulled due to safety or performance concerns. This incident highlights the ongoing challenges in testing and risk control before deploying large language models, and raises questions about Anthropic's safety assurances.

items.title: 个体10倍提效，组织却不足20%？AI产业正迎来Agent落地大考
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，AI 工具在个体层面实现了十倍效率提升，但在组织整体上却难以复制这种效果，提升不足 20%。这揭示了 Agent 落地的核心难题：如何将碎片化的个人效率转化为系统性组织效能。作者认为，打通数据孤岛、重构工作流和设计协作机制才是 Agent 产业化的真正大考。
items.summary_en: An article reveals that while AI tools boost individual productivity tenfold, organizations see less than 20% overall improvement, exposing the core challenge of Agent deployment: converting fragmented personal efficiency into systemic organizational impact. The author argues that breaking data silos, reengineering workflows, and designing collaboration mechanisms are the true tests for the Agent industry's industrialization.

items.title: 自主智能体遇阻：数据库成最大挑战
items.summary_zh: 自主智能体在从实验走向落地时，数据库成了最大的拦路虎。智能体需要实时读取、写入和关联海量数据，但传统数据库在高并发、低延迟和语义理解上远远不够。开发者不得不自己拼凑中间件或改造存储方案，这拖慢了整个行业前进的步伐。谁能突破数据库瓶颈，谁就能在智能体赛道抢先一步。
items.summary_en: Autonomous AI agents are hitting a major roadblock on their way from labs to production: databases. These agents need to read, write, and correlate massive amounts of data in real time, but conventional databases fall short in handling high concurrency, low latency, and semantic understanding. Developers are forced to cobble together custom middleware or hack storage solutions, which slows down the entire industry. The company that solves this database bottleneck could gain a huge lead in the agent race.

items.title: JetBrains 开源 Mellum2，尝试 Claude Code 无法涉足的领域
items.summary_zh: JetBrains 开源了 Mellum2，这一动作被解读为尝试进入 Claude Code 尚未完全覆盖的领域——例如更深度集成 IDE 的代码辅助和复杂重构。Mellum2 注重本地化运行和隐私保护，面向专业开发者提供高可控性的 AI 编程体验。此举有望在 AI 辅助编程市场开辟差异化赛道。
items.summary_en: JetBrains has open-sourced Mellum2, seen as an attempt to enter areas where Claude Code hasn't fully ventured, such as deeper IDE integration for code assistance and complex refactoring. Mellum2 emphasizes local execution and privacy, offering professional developers a highly controllable AI coding experience. This move could carve out a differentiated niche in the AI-assisted programming market.

items.title: 砍掉90%冗余词元，省下70万美元：Netflix开源工具狙击AI账单黑洞
items.summary_zh: Netflix开源了一款工具，能砍掉AI工作流中90%的冗余Token，一年省下70万美元。这些冗余Token来自日志、重复调用和无效上下文，以前大家视而不见，但Netflix发现它们是账单黑洞。这个工具自动优化输入输出，对使用大模型API的公司来说就像白捡钱。开源后，小团队也能享受巨头级别的成本控制。
items.summary_en: Netflix has open-sourced a tool that cuts 90% of redundant tokens in AI workflows, saving $700,000 per year. Those wasted tokens come from logs, repeated calls, and irrelevant context—things many teams ignore until the bill arrives. The tool automatically optimizes inputs and outputs, making it a no-brainer for any company using large language model APIs. By sharing it, Netflix lets smaller teams access enterprise-level cost control for free.
